name: golden oracle: the HIPAA regulated-data scenario tailors the design with audit logging, MFA, and strong consistency
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/business-translate.sh" --profile "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/golden/healthcare-booking-hipaa-profile.json" --out req.json --now 2026-06-08T00:00:00Z 2>/dev/null; node -e 'const j=JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync("req.json","utf8"));const s=new Set(Object.values(j.pillars).flat().map(c=>c.concern));process.exit(s.has("audit_logging")&&s.has("mfa")&&s.has("strong_consistency")?0:1)' && echo hipaa-tailored 1>&2
